mechanism_narrative: A sustained decline in the federal funds rate signals an easing monetary cycle that compresses discount rates applied to equity cash flows, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in easing periods are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: Rising unemployment rates signal deteriorating labor market conditions, reducing corporate earnings visibility and causing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 20d returns in > 60% of triggered instances despite negative signal or Rank IC < 0.02 over 3-year windows.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous declines in industrial production and GDP growth signal contractionary supply shocks, leading to negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
candidate_trigger: INDPRO and GDPC1 both decline > 2% YoY
failure_condition: 60-day forward returns in triggered periods show positive median performance (p > 0.10) or pairwise correlation between proxies drops below 0.4.

mechanism_narrative: Persistent inflation above 3% annualized (CPIAUCSL) triggers central bank tightening, increasing equity discount rates and producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over 20 days.
failure_condition: SPX 20d returns remain positive in > 55% of high-inflation periods or CPIAUCSL's predictive power (IC) falls below 0.05.

mechanism_narrative: Rising industrial production (INDPRO) indicates expanding manufacturing activity, boosting corporate profits and generating positive S&P 500 returns over 5 trading days.
failure_condition: 5-day forward returns in triggered periods show negative median performance (p > 0.10) or INDPRO's predictive power (IC) drops below 0.03.

mechanism_narrative: Increasing housing starts (HOUST) reflect strong residential demand, boosting construction-related sectors and generating positive S&P 500 returns over 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX 20d returns remain negative in > 50% of triggered instances or HOUST's predictive power (IC) falls below 0.04.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous growth in payrolls (PAYEMS) and declining unemployment (UNRATE) signal a strong labor market, driving corporate revenue growth and positive S&P 500 returns over 20 days.
failure_condition: 20-day forward returns in triggered periods show negative median performance (p > 0.10) or interaction effect size drops below 0.15.

mechanism_narrative: Rising residential sales (RSAFS) indicate strong household demand, increasing construction activity and generating positive S&P 500 returns over 5 trading days.
failure_condition: 5-day forward returns in triggered periods show negative median performance (p > 0.10) or RSAFS's predictive power (IC) falls below 0.03.
